description: If your hiking boots are hard working, you need equally tough hiker laces to keep your feet snug and safe in rugged terrain. And that's what the Hiker Round Laces from timberland do. They have the right amount of stretch to flex with your hiking boots, all set to stay with you forever.Length: 37"Made of 79% polyester and 21% cotton for ultimate durabilityFits into 4X2 eyeletsLace careWash by scrubbing it gently in your palms using a very mild detergent and warm water
